nasb.text: For the cherubim spread their wings over the place of the ark, and the cherubim made a covering over the ark and its poles from above.

esv.text: For the cherubim spread out their wings over the place of the ark, so that the cherubim overshadowed the ark and its poles.

cnv.text: 因為基路伯展開翅膀在約櫃所在地的上面，遮掩約櫃和抬櫃的槓。

ccb.text: 基路伯天使展开翅膀，遮盖约柜和抬约柜的横杠。
